---
name: Documentation
about: Fix or improve documentation
title: "docs: <concise description>"
labels: docs
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
<!-- What needs to be documented or fixed? -->

## Type
<!-- Which category? -->
- [ ] New guide (new feature coverage)
- [ ] Update existing guide (clarify, fix example, add section)
- [ ] API reference (SDK documentation)
- [ ] Troubleshooting
- [ ] Architecture/design doc (ADR, design decision)
- [ ] README / landing page

## What to update
<!-- Which docs files need changes? Path relative to repo root -->
- `docs/guides/<name>.md` (EN)
- `docs/guides/<name>.pt-BR.md` (PT-BR)

## Details
<!-- Describe the gap or issue. Include current text if relevant. -->

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] EN version updated: `docs/guides/<path>.md`
- [ ] PT-BR mirror created/updated: `docs/guides/<path>.pt-BR.md`
- [ ] Links are valid (no dead references)
- [ ] Code examples tested and correct
- [ ] Tone matches existing docs (concise, practical, user-focused)
